name: fetch:openai.chat.completions
description: Raw fetch() to OpenAI's chat completions endpoint (no SDK). The fetch patcher wraps input as `{url, method, body: <request body>}` and output as `{body: <response body>}`. Renderer strips the `fetch:` prefix, surfaces the URL + method as a small header strip ABOVE the chat (so the reviewer knows this was a direct HTTP call), then dispatches the inner `body` through the openai-chat renderer.
